description: AppleScript/JXA code injection via unescaped URL in anyquery chrome_tabs plugin. A SQL-controlled url value is interpolated into an AppleScript/JavaScript template and executed via osascript, allowing arbitrary OS command execution on macOS.

vulns.description: Insert path interpolates SQL-supplied url into AppleScript template via fmt.Sprintf(newTabScript, url) and executes with osascript -e without escaping quotes or newlines.
Update path interpolates SQL-supplied url into JXA setURL.js template via fmt.Sprintf(setURLScript, pk, url) and executes with osascript -l JavaScript -e without escaping.
